eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Potter; Randall, TX; at 02:40 PM ON FEB 17, 2026 Effective until 03:40 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: VOLUNTARY Evacuation immediately from Valley De Oro due to fire. This order is effective until further notice. Leave now and follow directions from emergency personnel. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly. For updates, Stay informed via local news or official channels.
